brand_identity.name: ID9_AGENCY (Impact Digital 9)
brand_identity.tagline: Be Impactful. Build Powerful Digital Brands.
brand_identity.core_emotion: Premium, authoritative, internationally credible, futuristic, immersive
anti_ai_slop_rules: NO purple-on-white gradients. Violet must only be used on pure dark backgrounds (#070707) as radial glows or glassmorphic accents.
NO generic Inter for headings. Montserrat is requested, but MUST be used in its extremes (font-black with tracking-tighter) to avoid a generic SaaS template look.
AVOID center-everything layouts. Rely on asymmetric alignments, bento grids, and overlapping sections.

colors.usage_rules: Deep black (#070707) is the dominant background. Violet (#743089) is used for ambient glows (backdrop-blur) and hover states, NOT flat backgrounds. Orange (#FFA500) is reserved strictly for high-impact CTAs and kinetic triggers.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-[1.1]
scale.overline: text-xs md:text-sm font-medium tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-orange_impact font-poppins
scale.body: text-base md:text-lg font-light leading-relaxed text-secondary font-inter
scale.caption: text-sm text-muted font-inter

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tighter) to look editorial.
Overlines must use Poppins, uppercase, wide tracking.
Avoid bold body text. Rely on color contrast (Primary vs Muted) for hierarchy within body.

patterns.hero: Asymmetric split layout. Huge left-aligned typography, overlapping 3D floating orb on the right, cinematic dark overlay.
patterns.portfolio_grid: Bento/Masonry hybrid (tetris mode). Mixing col-span-4 and col-span-8 to create visual tension.
patterns.process_timeline: Sticky left column with section title, right column scrolling through timeline steps (Discover -> Strategy -> Launch).
patterns.navigation: Floating top pill navigation (Glassmorphism). Center links, right magnetic CTA button.
patterns.admin_dashboard: Utilitarian dark mode (Archetype 4 structural vibe but dark). Strict grid, 1px borders, #1C1C1E surfaces, dense data layouts.

buttons.primary: Magnetic effect. bg-orange_impact text-black font-poppins font-semibold rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,165,0,0.4)]
buttons.secondary_glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white font-poppins rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-all

cards.service: bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 p-8 rounded-2xl group hover:border-violet_premium/50 transition-colors duration-500 relative overflow-hidden
cards.portfolio: Image-centric. No visible border until hover. Overlay gradient from bottom, revealing text on hover.

inputs.form: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 focus:border-orange_impact py-4 rounded-none text-white outline-none transition-colors

patterns: Staggered text reveals (words masking up) for H1 and H2.
Parallax on all background hero images.
Magnetic hover effects on primary buttons.

media.strategy: Mix real, high-end cinematic workspaces (muted tones) with pure abstract 3D geometry and neon glows to bridge 'Business Authority' and 'Creative Innovation'.

hero_abstract_bg.description: Cinematic deep black void with subtle violet/orange glassmorphism orbs for Hero background.

services_abstract_3d.description: Abstract 3D geometric shapes with premium lighting, suitable for the Services section background or card accents.

premium_workspace_1.description: Dark futuristic workspace. Use for 'About' or 'Why Us' sections to anchor the abstract UI in reality.

cinematic_neon_glow.description: Cinematic abstract dark neon gradient. Use as a background mask for the Final CTA section.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements (buttons, cards, forms) MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='contact-form-submit').
